title: Tick Control in New Hyde Park, NY | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in New Hyde Park, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Expert treatment $125-$325. Call today!
intro: New Hyde Park residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's abundant green spaces and proximity to wooded areas. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from dangerous tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease and anaplasmosis. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick treatments tailored to New Hyde Park's unique landscape and residential properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving New Hyde Park and Long Island communities for years with proven tick elimination methods and preventative treatments. Our licensed technicians understand the specific tick species common to Nassau County and use EPA-approved products that are safe for children, pets, and the environment while delivering maximum effectiveness.
localContext: From the tree-lined residential streets near New Hyde Park Road to properties backing onto local parks and the proximity to Lake Success, New Hyde Park homes are particularly vulnerable to tick infestations during spring and summer months. Our service area includes all neighborhoods surrounding Memorial Park and extends throughout the Garden City Park border areas where deer ticks are especially prevalent.

faqs.question: When is tick season in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Tick season in New Hyde Park typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, warmer winters have extended tick activity, so year-round vigilance is recommended. We suggest scheduling treatments in early spring before tick populations explode and maintaining regular treatments throughout the season.

faqs.question: What does your tick control service include in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of professional-grade tick treatments to high-risk areas like lawn perimeters, wooded edges, shrubs, and ground cover. We focus on areas where ticks congregate and where your family and pets spend time. Treatment includes a perimeter barrier and typically lasts 4-6 weeks depending on weather conditions.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in New Hyde Park range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, the extent of tick activity, and whether you choose single treatments or seasonal packages. Most residential properties fall in the $150-$225 range for individual treatments. We offer discounted rates for season-long protection plans with multiple treatments.

faqs.question: Is tick treatment safe for my children and pets in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries. Once dry, treated areas are completely safe. We can also discuss organic and natural tick control options for families preferring alternative methods.
